_notes: Source: hemas-condition (hospital-specific). Target: US Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis. Source is heavily constrained with hospital-specific extensions, mandatory ICD-10 code coding slice, mandatory clinicalStatus/encounter/recordedDate, hemas-specific category slices, and hemas VS bindings. Target adds assertedDate extension (MS) but is otherwise more relaxed: no mandatory coding slices, us-core-condition-code VS, us-core category slice, wider onset/abatement types, and us-core patient/encounter references.

drifts.description: Source root constraints hemas-con-1(error) and hemas-con-2(warning) removed in target: hemas-condition defines error and warning constraints on Condition; US Core Condition Encounter Diagnosis has no root-level constraints.
Optional extension hospitalDepartment[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is absent in target.
Optional extension icdBlock[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is absent in target.
Optional extension chronicity[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is absent in target.
New optional extension assertedDate[max=1 mustSupport=true] added in target (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-assertedDate); source hemas-condition has no assertedDate extension.

clinicalStatus cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true, required:condition-clinical] → target [no min, mustSupport=true, required:condition-clinical]. Min decreased from 1 to 0. Binding and MustSupport preserved.

category slicing changed: source has hemas-specific slices (admissionDiagnosis, dischargeDiagnosis); target has only us-core slice. Source category slices removed and replaced by different target slice.
category:admissionDiagnosis MS slice [0..1, mustSupport=true] removed in target: US Core has no admissionDiagnosis category slice.
category:dischargeDiagnosis MS slice [0..1, mustSupport=true, hemas CodeSystem pattern] removed in target: US Core has no dischargeDiagnosis category slice.

New mandatory MS category slice us-core[min=1, max=1, mustSupport=true] added in target with patternCodeableConcept encoding encounter-diagnosis from http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-category; source has no us-core category slice.

severity MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true with extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity); target US Core does not constrain severity. MS removed on optional element.
severity binding removed in target: source has extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity); target US Core does not constrain severity. Source binding absent in target.

code binding changed: source extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code) [hemas-specific VS] → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-condition-code) [US Core condition codes VS]. Same binding strength (extensible), different value sets.
code.coding slicing removed in target: source defines pattern:$this slicing on code.coding with icd10 and snomed named slices; target US Core does not constrain code.coding sub-elements.

Mandatory code.coding:icd10 slice [min=1, max=1, mustSupport=true] removed in target: source requires at least one ICD-10 coding; target has no coding slice constraints. Mandatory coding requirement removed.
Optional code.coding:snomed slice [0..1, mustSupport=true] removed in target: MS removed on optional slice element.
code.text MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain code.text. MS removed on optional element.
bodySite MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true with extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site); target does not constrain bodySite. MS removed on optional element.
bodySite binding removed in target: source has extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site); target does not constrain bodySite. Source binding absent in target.

subject reference target changed: source constrains to hemas/Patient (https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient) → target constrains to us-core-patient (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-patient). Different profile targets.
encounter cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [no min, mustSupport=true]. Min decreased from 1 to 0. MustSupport preserved.

encounter reference target changed: source constrains to hemas/Encounter (https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter) → target constrains to us-core-encounter (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-encounter). Different profile targets.

onset[x] types widened in target: source restricts types to [dateTime, Period]; target allows [dateTime, Age, Period, Range, string]. Types Age, Range, and string added in target, widening permitted types.

abatement[x] types widened in target: source restricts types to [dateTime, Period]; target allows [dateTime, Age, Period, Range, string]. Types Age, Range, and string added in target, widening permitted types.
recordedDate cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [no min, mustSupport=true]. Min decreased from 1 to 0. MustSupport preserved.
recorder MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain recorder. MS removed on optional element.
stage MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain stage. MS removed on optional element.
stage.summary MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain stage.summary. MS removed on optional element.
note MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; target does not constrain note. MS removed on optional element.
